name: Rin Tohsaka
desc: Hailing from a world beyond our universe where magic and magecraft coexist, this young mage tirelessly hones her skills. She is the Sixth Head of the Tohsaka family, a prestigious lineage of Fuyuki City mages.

1.name: Zelretch's Apprentice
1.desc: If one instance of the Enhanced Skill consumes <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> or more "Gem Energy," Rin Tohsaka gains "Shadow Gem" equal to the amount of "Gem Energy" consumed.\nWhile holding "Shadow Gem," enhances Skill to "Second Magic Experiment." The Enhanced Skill consumes all "Shadow Gem," does not trigger the effect that converts Skill Points into "Gem Energy," and does not consume "Gem Energy."

2.name: Dimensional Traveler
2.desc: Rin Tohsaka's Skill DMG dealt increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. While Rin Tohsaka is on the field, Skill DMG dealt by all allies becomes <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of the original DMG.

3.name: Holy Grail War: Victory Memorial
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Red Devil: Triple Speed
4.desc: When the CRIT DMG boost effect from the Talent "Gem Magecraft" applies to Rin Tohsaka, the effect can stack, up to <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s).

5.name: Goddess of Venus's Favor
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Nailed It This Time!
6.desc: Rin Tohsaka's All-Type <u>RES PEN</u> increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When using Ultimate, gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> "Gem Energy" and 1 <u>extra turn</u>.

10000000.name: Extra Turn
10000000.desc: Gain 1 extra turn that won't expend your remaining turns when taking action. During this extra turn, no Ultimate can be used.

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

150801.name: Bajiquan
150801.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Rin Tohsaka's ATK to one designated enemy.
150801.simple_desc: Deals minor Quantum DMG to one designated enemy.

150802.name: Jeweled Sword Zelretch
150802.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Rin Tohsaka's ATK to one designated enemy.
150802.simple_desc: Deals Quantum DMG to one designated enemy.

150803.name: <unbreak>An Gal Ta</unbreak> <unbreak>Ki Gal Šè</unbreak>
150803.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Rin Tohsaka's ATK to one designated enemy, and Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Rin Tohsaka's ATK to other enemy targets. When used, recovers <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> Skill Point(s) for allies, and increases the DMG taken by all enemies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
150803.simple_desc: Deals massive Quantum DMG to one designated enemy and Quantum DMG to other enemy targets. When used, increases the DMG taken by all enemies and recovers Skill Point(s) for allies.

150804.name: Gem Magecraft
150804.desc: When entering combat, gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> "Gem Energy." When an ally target consumes or recovers Skill Points, increases their CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s). For every 1 Skill Point consumed or recovered, Rin Tohsaka gains 1 "Gem Energy." If Rin Tohsaka holds <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> or more "Gem Energy," or if the current Skill Points are <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> or more, her Skill is enhanced to "Second Magic Experiment."
150804.simple_desc: When entering combat, <color=#f29e38ff>gains</color> <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> <color=#f29e38ff>"Gem Energy"</color>. When an ally target <color=#f29e38ff>consumes or recovers Skill Points</color>, <color=#f29e38ff>increases their CRIT DMG</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>grants Rin Tohsaka "Gem Energy."</color> If Rin Tohsaka holds <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color> or more "Gem Energy," or the current Skill Points are <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> or more, her Skill is enhanced to "Second Magic Experiment."

150805.name: Freeform Tohsaka Style
150805.desc: After <unbreak>Archer</unbreak> uses his Skill "Caladbolg II: Fake Spiral Sword" to attack, if Skill Points are <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> or fewer or if "Caladbolg II: Fake Spiral Sword" has been actively used 5 times during the current "Circuit Connection" state, and the <u>Joint Follow-Up ATK</u> from "Freeform Tohsaka Style" has not been triggered, Rin Tohsaka and <unbreak>Archer</unbreak> will launch <u>Joint Follow-Up ATK</u> on all enemies, dealing Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Rin Tohsaka's ATK and <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of <unbreak>Archer</unbreak>'s ATK respectively, and recovering <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Skill Point(s) for allies. This <u>Joint Follow-Up ATK</u> can only trigger once. The trigger count resets when Rin Tohsaka's turn ends.
150805.simple_desc: After <unbreak>Archer</unbreak> uses his Skill "Caladbolg II: Fake Spiral Sword" to attack, if Skill Points are <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> or fewer, or if "Caladbolg II: Fake Spiral Sword" has been actively used 5 times during the current "Circuit Connection" state, and the <u>Joint Follow-Up ATK</u> from "Freeform Tohsaka Style" has not yet been triggered, Rin Tohsaka and <unbreak>Archer</unbreak> will launch <u>Joint Follow-Up ATK</u> on all enemies, dealing massive Quantum DMG and recovering Skill Point(s) for allies. This <u>Joint Follow-Up ATK</u> can only trigger once. The trigger count resets when Rin Tohsaka ends her turn.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

10000019.name: Joint Attack
10000019.desc: Multiple targets respectively use attacks on enemy targets in one action.

150806.name: Attack
150806.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

150807.name: Conversion Charge
150807.desc: After using Technique, gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> "Gem Energy" at the start of the next battle.
150807.simple_desc: After using Technique, gains <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> "Gem Energy" at the start of the next battle.

150809.name: Second Magic Experiment
150809.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Rin Tohsaka's ATK to all enemies. Then, consumes <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> "Gem Energy" to additionally deal Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Rin Tohsaka's ATK to one random enemy target. This repeats until "Gem Energy" is less than <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> or there are no enemy targets with current HP greater than 0. Can repeat up to <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> cycle(s). When used, if the current Skill Points are greater than <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>, consumes Skill Points down to <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>, and for each Point consumed, immediately gains <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> "Gem Energy."
150809.simple_desc: Deals minor Quantum DMG to all enemies. Then, <color=#f29e38ff>consumes "Gem Energy"</color> to additionally deal minor Quantum DMG to random single enemy targets for a certain number of times. When used, if the current Skill Points are greater than <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>, consumes Skill Points down to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>, and for each point consumed, immediately <color=#f29e38ff>gains</color> <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color> <color=#f29e38ff>"Gem Energy"</color>.

1.point_desc: While Rin Tohsaka is on the field, additionally increases the upper limit of Skill Points by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>. When entering combat, Rin Tohsaka's ATK increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, and Quantum <u>RES PEN</u> increases by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>. If <unbreak>Archer</unbreak> is in the team, <unbreak>Archer</unbreak> also gains this effect.

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

1.point_desc: When entering combat or after using Enhanced Skill, increases Rin Tohsaka's SPD by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
When Rin Tohsaka uses Ultimate, gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> "Gem Energy."
